title: Baldavian pocket hare
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Baldavian}} {{Species |image= |name=Baldavian pocket hare |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Skittish demeanor''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|You sure you don't want to come along? […]''"
"''[…] You will not have enough supplies to take four out there and back, especially if that hyperdrive is not performing well.''"
"''I smell a Baldavian pocket hare.|Danni Quee and Yomin Carr|}} '''Baldavian pocket hare''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of skittish creatures. Due to its skittish nature, cowardly individuals and acts were sometimes compared to them. As a colloquialism, comparisons to Baldavian pockets hares as a symbol of cowardice were in use''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]'' in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' when the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] compared the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] to one. This comparison was still used in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], when the [[Extragalactic Society]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Danni Quee]] jokingly likened [[Gender/Legends|her]] colleague [[Yomin Carr]], who was secretly a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]], to a Baldavian pocket hare for declining to join an investigatory expedition to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Helska IV]]. Around the same [[Time/Legends|time]], the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Solo]] suggested his [[Parent/Legends|father]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], was "too pocket hare" when he balked at flying the [[Asteroid field/Legends|Asteroid belt]] [[Lando's Folly]] on the grounds that he was too old and sore. ==Behind the scenes== Baldavian pocket hares were first mentioned in the [[1999]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', written by [[R. A. Salvatore]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Baldavischer Taschenhase |pl=Baldaviański zając kieszonkowy }} [[Category:Creatures of unspecified biology]] [[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]] [[Category:Hares]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
